mapper.insert: INSERT INTO family_iep (child_id, parent_user_id, parent_goal, draft, finalized_content, status) VALUES (#{childId}, #{parentUserId}, #{parentGoal}, #{draft}, #{finalizedContent}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, child_id, parent_user_id, parent_goal, draft, finalized_content, status FROM family_iep WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, child_id, parent_user_id, parent_goal, draft, finalized_content, status FROM family_iep WHERE child_id = #{childId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE family_iep SET finalized_content = #{content}, status = 'FINALIZED' WHERE id = #{id}
